title: Walk This Way
excerpt: photos & gif by Ann-Marie Morris Okay, so I don't exactly skip every time I walk the dogs, but since it was for a gif, I added a little spring to my step. And Buster did his usual leg lift…
body:
photos & gif by Ann-Marie Morris

Okay, so I don't exactly skip every time I walk the dogs, but since it was for a gif, I added a little spring to my step. And Buster did his usual leg lift - he has to make his mark at least 20 times on every walk, and apparently didn't want you all to miss out.
